source_pr.title: planner: output skyline pruning information when executing EXPLAIN
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26320

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

When executing `explain format = 'verbose' ...`, if skyline pruning prunes some indices, a NOTE-level warning will be generated to indicate which candidates remain after pruning.

How it Works:
Introduce `OptimInfo map[int]string` in `StatementContext`, which maps `Plan.ID()` to optimization information when generating `Plan`. In the end of `DataSource.findBestTask`, we record pruning information in `OptimInfo[t.plan().ID()]` and add the information to warnings when executing `EXPLAIN`. We don't directly append warning in `DataSource.findBestTask` since the function would be called several times in CBO.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
output skyline pruning information when executing explain format = 'verbose'
```
